message:
feat(cli,config): expand batched mutation commands with stale-cache pre-marking and routing test coverage

- Expand close, defer, reopen, and update commands with additional
  blocked-cache stale-marking before rebuild attempts for graceful
  degradation on partial failures
- Add label command batch operation improvements
- Expand config module with additional validation helpers
- Add e2e routing test coverage for command dispatch paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
